sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47992" key="qeatropoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεᾱτρο-ποιός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n47992.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making a theatre</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0405.tlg001:34:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxandr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34.9</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
